label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, this question is asking me to predict how a typical person would answer a question about whether a man intentionally poisoned some people, even though he was just doing his job and getting paid. Let me read the scenario carefully: There's a man who gets paid for pumping water into a cistern, which replenishes the supply of drinking water in a nearby house. The water he's pumping into the cistern today has been systematically contaminated with a lethal poison whose effects are unnoticeable until they can't be cured. The man knows the water has been poisoned, but he had nothing to do with poisoning it. He pumps the water into the cistern knowing it will poison and kill the inhabitants. He doesn't care about the inhabitants, he just wants to do his job and get paid. The question is whether the man "intentionally poisoned
